arts.ttl: Man United could launch transfer bid for £60m star Erik ten Hag loves - 'there will be movement'
arts.sum: RB Leipzig star Xavi Simons was linked with a move to Manchester United last summer before he joined the Bundesliga club on a permanent deal in January.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Chelsea go ‘all in’ for Liam Delap
arts.sum: Chelsea will do everything they can to sign Liam Delap from Ipswich Town in the summer, sources have told FootballTransfers. Chelsea’s form has collapsed over this period, with Cole Palmer’s goal drought further underlining the need for the Stamford Bridge side told find a goal-scoring solution.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand names the £232MILLION quartet of Man United stars who do not fit Ruben Amorim's tactical style
arts.sum: Arriving on the back of a wave of optimism following the departure of Erik ten Hag, armed with his much-vaunted 3-4-2-1 system, few United fans would have predicted their current plight.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho must answer TWO questions from Ruben Amorim after Man Utd walk out
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho prompted questions in Ruben Amorim's press conference after he head straight down the tunnel at Old Trafford against Ipswich and left his head coach with more

arts.ttl: Manchester United defender Patrick Dorgu given brutal reality check vs Ipswich Town
arts.sum: Man Utd won 3-2 against Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Wednesday, despite Patrick Dorgu being sent off.

arts.ttl: Man United given Harry Kane truth after Ruben Amorim confirmed club's transfer plans
arts.sum: Manchester United haven't prospered under new boss Ruben Amorim, who pleaded with his employers to secure the services of a goalscorer during the January transfer window

arts.ttl: I heard angry Manchester United chant - it showed who is to blame for nightmare season
arts.sum: Man Utd won 3-2 against Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Wednesday and here are the moments you might have missed.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives Patrick Dorgu verdict after Manchester United red card vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu was sent-off on just his fourth appearance for Man United during Wednesday night's 3-2 win over Ipswich Town at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim credits two Manchester United coaches for win vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Man United secured their first Premier League win in a month against Ipswich Town thanks to three goals from set pieces.

arts.ttl: Michael Owen reveals Sir Alex Ferguson desperation after making Man Utd admission
arts.sum: More than a decade after leaving Manchester United, racing enthusiast Michael Owen is "desperate" to engineer a new working relationship with his ex-Old Trafford boss
